description: The SessionInfoItemInterface is usually mapped to a World Data Feed Item in order to show information about a particular session.

fields.SessionName: The field to fill with the SessionName of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.Description: The field to fill with the Description of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.ThumbnailUrl: The field to fill with the ThumbnailUrl of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.SessionId: The field to fill with the SessionId of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.SessionURLs: The fill to drive with the SessionURLs of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.HostUserId: The fill to drive with the HostUserId of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.HostUserSessionId: The field to fill with the HostUserSessionId of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.HostMachineId: The field to fill with the HostMachineId of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.HostUsername: The field to fill with the HostUsername of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.CompatibilityHash: The field to fill with the CompatibilityHash of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.UniverseId: The field to fill with the UniverseId of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.AppVersion: The field to fill with the AppVersion of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.IsHeadlessHost: The field to fill with the IsHeadlessHost of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.IsOnLAN: The field to fill with the IsOnLAN of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.JoinedUsers: The field to fill with the JoinedUsers of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.ActiveUsers: The field to fill with the ActiveUsers of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.TotalJoinedUsers: The field to fill with the TotalJoinedUsers of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.TotalActiveUsers: The field to fill with the TotalActiveUsers of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.MaximumUsers: The field to fill with the MaximumUsers of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.SessionBeginTime: The field to fill with the SessionBeginTime of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.LastUpdate: The field to fill with the LastUpdate of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.AccessLevel: The field to fill with the AccessLevel of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.HideFromListing: The field to fill with the HideFromListing of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.AwayKickEnabled: The field to fill with the AwayKickEnabled of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
fields.AwayKickInterval: The field to fill with the AwayKickInterval of the FeedItem mapped to this interface.
